title: My comfort level using automated trading
author: United_Coyote4349
selftext:
I’ve noticed that my attitude toward trading automation has changed over time.  
At first it felt exciting, then a bit overwhelming, and now I’m more cautious.  
I tend to trust systems only when I understand their limitations.  
Fully hands-off setups still make me uncomfortable.  
Reading and experimenting with tools like [darkbot.io](http://darkbot.io) pushed me to think about that more.  
In the end, automation feels useful, but only when it stays transparent and intentional.
